auth.forgot_password_desc: We'll send a password reset link to your registered email address.
auth.email_sent_desc: A password reset link has been sent to your email. Please check your inbox.
auth.account_created: Your account has been created successfully.
auth.fill_form_desc: Fill in the fields below to create an account.
auth.error_user_not_found: No account found with this email.
auth.error_email_in_use: This email address is already in use.
auth.error_weak_password: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
auth.error_too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
auth.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth.verify_desc: We sent a verification link to {email}. Please check your inbox (and spam folder).
auth.verify_resent_failed: Could not send email. Please try again.
auth.verify_not_yet_desc: Your email doesn't appear to be verified yet. Please click the link in the email and try again.
auth.verify_change_account: Sign in with a different account
auth.complete_profile_desc: You signed in with Google. Please complete the info below so we can recommend the right venues for you and your match.

validation.fill_required: Please fill in the required fields.
validation.email_empty: Email and password fields cannot be empty.
validation.invalid_email_message: Please enter a valid email address (e.g. example@email.com).

venue.permission_error: Location permission required. You can select from the map.
venue.load_error: Could not get location. You can select from the map.

venue_rating.title: Rate
venue_rating.rating_shared_desc: Your rating for {venue} has been added to the feed.

friends.title: Friends
friends.no_suggestions_desc: New users will appear here when they join
friends.no_friends_desc: Search using a code to add friends
friends.error_send: An error occurred while sending the request.
friends.error_accept: An error occurred while accepting the request.
friends.error_reject: An error occurred while rejecting the request.
friends.error_cancel: An error occurred while cancelling the request.

friend_code.title: Add Friend with Code
friend_code.user_not_found: No user found with this code.
friend_code.already_exists_desc: You already have a friend request with this person.
friend_code.matched_desc: {name} had already sent you a request, so since it was mutual you're now friends.
friend_code.share_info: Share your code to invite friends to the app.

match.title: Find a Meetup Spot
match.subtitle: Venue suggestions tailored to your and your friend's personality.
match.no_friends_desc: Add a friend first to find a meetup spot!
match.no_profile_desc: Complete the personality test to get venue suggestions.
match.no_venues_desc: Try different activity types or price levels.
match.location_error: Could not get location. Please allow location access.
match.solo_hint: If you don't pick a friend, we'll suggest venues near you on your own.
match.personality_customized: Venue suggestions personalized to your profile.
match.add_friend_hint: Add a friend from the Friends tab first
match.map_no_location: Can't show this on the map because location data is missing.

profile.title: Profile
profile.no_reviews_desc: Pick a venue you've visited to add your first review!

settings.title: Settings
settings.retake_quiz_desc: Update venue suggestions by retaking the test
settings.add_friend_code_desc: Add a friend or share your 6-digit code
settings.sign_out_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings.about_text:
Version 1.0.0
Meetings have never been this easy.

edit_profile.title: Edit Profile
edit_profile.update_error: An error occurred while updating the profile.

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.strong_password_info: A strong password should contain uppercase letters, numbers, and special characters.
change_password.too_short: New password must be at least 6 characters.
change_password.dont_match: New password and confirmation don't match.
change_password.updated: Your password has been updated successfully.

quiz.title: Personality Test
quiz.subtitle: We'll find the right places for you
quiz.venue_personalized: Venue suggestions are personalized to your profile!

quiz_intro.title: Let's Get to Know You First
quiz_intro.desc: To recommend the best places for you and the person you're meeting, we need a short personality test. Just a few questions, won't take long.

map_picker.title: Select Location
map_picker.drag_hint: Drag the pin to set your location
map_picker.out_of_scope_warning: The app currently only works within Istanbul. Please choose a location inside Istanbul.

home.subtitle: Ready to meet up with your friends?
home.no_friends_hint: You don't have any friends yet.
home.no_friends_cta: Friends you add will show up here. Invite or add one now!
home.no_reviews_hint: No reviews near you yet. Add the first one!
home.view_analysis_desc: See how your profile has changed over time

venue_detail.title: Venue
venue_detail.no_reviews: No reviews for this venue yet.
venue_detail.must_visit_first: You need to visit this venue before you can review it.
venue_detail.already_reviewed: You've already left a review for this venue.

review.review_added_desc: Your review has been added to the venue.
review.already_reviewed_desc: You can only leave one review per venue.

personality.social_butterfly_desc: You love lively atmospheres and connect easily with new people. Your energy is contagious!
personality.calm_soul_desc: You prefer peaceful and quiet environments. Deep conversations and meaningful moments matter to you.
personality.adventurer_desc: You want to experience everything. Unusual activities and exploration make you happy.
personality.intellectual_desc: Culture, art and knowledge are important to you. Deep discussions and inspiring venues attract you.
personality.foodie_desc: Food is an experience for you. You seek quality flavors and special venues.

personality_analysis.title: My Personality Analysis
personality_analysis.evolves_hint: Your profile isn't fixed: it slowly shifts over time as you write reviews for venues you visit. Just receiving a venue recommendation does not change your profile.
personality_analysis.history_subtitle: Last {count} records — lines on the left show each type's score, the list on the right shows the change since the first record.
personality_analysis.history_empty: There isn't more than one record yet. Once you start reviewing venues, your profile will change over time and a chart will appear here.

friend_compat.title: Friend Compatibility
friend_compat.tier_excellent: Excellent match! You have very similar personalities.
friend_compat.tier_great: A great match — you'll have a wonderful time together.
friend_compat.tier_good: A good match, you share common ground.
friend_compat.tier_medium: A moderate match — your differences could make things interesting.
friend_compat.tier_different: Quite different personalities, which can also bring new experiences.
